articles.title: Today’s Papers: Milan do the double over Inter, Napoli’s Fab 4 return
articles.summary: La Gazzetta dello Sport  Milan of dreams  Inter nullified, Scudetto reopened  Estupinan decides they derby:...

articles.title: Del Piero to Modric: "You can play until you're 50!". And Luka replies: "We like to fight and suffer"
articles.summary: Luka Modric joked with Alessandro Del Piero on CBS Sports Golazo about his second youth in Italy.

articles.title: Estupinan gives the derby to the Devil. QS: "Milan reopens the scudetto"
articles.summary: The Quotidiano Sportivo on newsstands today has the following headline to comment on the Rossoneri's victory in the Milan derby last night: "Milan reopens the Scudetto". The Devil is now -7 in the standings.

articles.title: Moviola CorSport: Ricci arm, it's not a penalty. The explanation
articles.summary: Corriere dello Sport also analyzes Daniele Doveri's refereeing in last night's Milan derby. Match without any major incidents to report except towards the end when Inter protested on two occasions.

articles.title: CorSera headlines: "Milan seven beautiful. Inter, bad copy"
articles.summary: Regarding the Rossoneri's victory in last night's Milan derby, today's edition of the Corriere della Sera headlined as follows: "Milan seven beautiful. Inter, draft".

articles.title: Derby at Milan, Cardinale goes to the changing rooms after the match: "Proud of the team"
articles.summary: After the final whistle from referee Doveri, the cameras immediately focused on the San Siro grandstand where Gerry Cardinale was also there and smilingly celebrated his Milan's victory against Inter 1-0 thanks to a ...

articles.title: Tuttosport opens: "StraMilan. Allegri gives Chivu another lesson and gets back to -7"
articles.summary: "StraMilan. Inter, derby nightmare: Estupinan reopens the championship fight": this is the headline on Tuttosport's front page this morning following the Devil's victory in the derby against the Nerazzurri.

articles.title: Moviola Gazzetta: Inter protests, but Ricci retracts his arm
articles.summary: This morning, La Gazzetta dello Sport analyzes the refereeing episodes of yesterday's Milan derby, focusing in particular on the penalty requested at the end by Inter for a handball in the area by Samuele Ricci.

articles.title: CorSport on the front page after Milan-Inter 1-0: "L'Allegrata"
articles.summary: This is how Corriere dello Sport opens its front page this morning regarding Milan's 1-0 victory against Inter yesterday: "L'Allegrata".

articles.title: The opening of the Gazzetta: "Milan as a dream. Inter won, scudetto reopened"
articles.summary: Today's edition of the Gazzetta dello Sport headlines this morning on the front page: "Milan dream. Inter victorious, scudetto reopened".

articles.title: Milan is still red and black! Rossoneri at -7, but Allegri continues to talk only about the Champions League
articles.summary: Milan is still red and black: Milan also won the return derby last night with the same result as the first leg, 1-0.

articles.title: Milan is taking part in the "Amici dei Bambini" event today: Bartesaghi present. With him the Inter player Bartesaghi
articles.summary: On Monday 9 March 2026 at the Carro Social Club in via Granelli n.1 in Sesto San Giovanni, Davide Bartesaghi and Yann Aurel Bisseck will receive the "Friend of Children" Award.

articles.title: A note in Doveri's report is the only negative note of the derby for Milan
articles.summary: The only negative note of the derby won yesterday by Milan comes from the referee Doveri's report.

articles.title: Victory in the derby and day of rest: Milan are not training today. Shooting tomorrow
articles.summary: After yesterday's derby victory against Inter, Massimiliano Allegri gave his players a day of rest: today, therefore, there will be no training at Milanello. The sessions will resume tomorrow.

articles.title: Milan, the next match: it will be another big match after all the rivals
articles.summary: After the victory in the derby, Milan will host Lazio on Sunday: kick-off at the Olimpico set for 8.45pm.

articles.title: Serie A, the 28th matchday ends tonight with the postponement of Monday
articles.summary:
Below is the program for the 28th matchday of Serie A:

06/03/2026 Friday 8.45pm Naples - Turin DAZN
03/07/2026 Saturday 15.

articles.title: Inter, there is no disallowed goal. Duties whistles clearly, several times, before the ball goes in
articles.summary: At the end of the match Inter "scored" from a corner, with Carlos Augusto deflecting Dimarco's cross from a few steps away and scoring. But it doesn't apply, in fact, it doesn't exist at all.

articles.title: Ambrosini: "Let's not underestimate the psychological aspect. Inter lost the last two championships in the sprint against Napoli and Milan"
articles.summary:
Milan wins the Derby, and the question is automatic: championship reopened? Massimo Ambrosini, in the DAZN studios, talks about it like this:

“Let's not underestimate the psychological aspect.
